title: Create task contract system
objective: Implement a task contract parser/validator and establish a canonical task contract format for the bl1nk-doc-mcp project.
non_goals: Do not implement tool execution handlers.
Do not modify repository state beyond task contracts.
invariants: Task contracts are read-only and validated deterministically.
Acceptance checks can be pending, passed, failed, or skipped.

acceptance_checks.description: TaskContract can be parsed from valid JSON
Unit tests cover parse and validate paths
